title: MinePay
description: Professional in-game store system built for server monetization.
body:
<center>
  
![MinePay](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yNEDEmdo/images/435164fd16e76a9bb50780b849e29e4bd7521780.png)

 ## **MinePay — Enterprise Payments for Minecraft Servers**

MinePay is an in-game store and payment system built **directly with PayPal’s Partner API**, providing secure player payments, automated payouts, and full seller analytics. The plugin is completely free to use and only charges **4% per successful transaction**—no monthly fees, no setup fees, and no hidden costs.

Whether you are running a small SMP or a large network, MinePay gives you professional payment infrastructure built specifically for Minecraft servers.

<iframe width="280" height="158" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/4ONpFqaLbgk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


![Shop Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yNEDEmdo/images/d193990fc48697d391665567a54a5bbc6bf5667e.gif)

### **✨ Key Features**  
✔ Example in-game store generated automatically on first load  
✔ Add multiple items to cart before checkout  
✔ Discount codes & coupons support  
✔ Completely Customizable In-Game Shop  
✔ Direct PayPal Partner integration  
✔ Automated payouts  
✔ Real-time analytics  
✔ Unlimited transactions  
✔ 0% monthly cost  
✔ Secure payment processing via PayPal  
✔ Supports ItemsAdder  
✔ Supports modded items  
✔ Works on Spigot, Paper & forks  

###  **Transparent Pricing**
MinePay is always free to install and use.  
**Only 4% is charged per successful payment.**  

****$0/month**/month**
Unlimited transactions  
Full dashboard access  
Shop builder  
  
**4% per successful payment**
charged only when you earn  
never charged on failed transactions  
  
###  **Real-Time Seller Dashboard**
Login to your [MinePay Dashboard](https://trinetic.net/) to view:  

Sales • Revenue • Products • Payouts • Analytics • Player Purchases  
Everything updates in real time, no refresh needed.  
  
###  **Secure Payment Infrastructure**
MinePay uses:  
  
PayPal Partner API  
Seller authentication  
Order verification  
Fraud-resistant endpoints  
  
Your players pay through PayPal, and payouts go directly to your PayPal account. PayPal offers alternate payment options such as debit and credit cards, and Venmo.
  
###  **Shop Features**
  
Full Customization  
Custom Variables  
Custom Requirements  
Commands on Successful Purchase  
Subscriptions *(coming soon)*  
Package delivery  
  
Everything is handled automatically once a payment completes.  
  
###  **Requirements**
  
Java 8+  
Spigot, Paper, or compatible fork  
A PayPal business account to access all payment options  
Casual PayPal accounts are limited to PayPal, Guest (Debit/Credit), and Venmo Checkout.  
  
### **⚙️ Installation**

Download the plugin  
Place it in your plugins folder  
Restart your server  
Register an account on our [Website](https://trinetic.net/)  
Add a new Game Server and follow prompts to Authenticate  
Configure products using /minepay admin or config files  
Full documentation:  
[https://trinetic.net/wiki](https://trinetic.net/wiki)  
  
### **❓ Support**
Need help? Join our Discord:  
[Discord](https://discord.gg/zsh4hbm3nj)  
[Website](https://trinetic.net/)  
 [GitHub](https://github.com/trineticdev/minepay-releases)  
  
###  **Try MinePay Today**  
MinePay gives servers access to professional-grade payments without monthly platform fees—making it the easiest way to monetize Minecraft servers using PayPal safely and reliably.</center>
